channel.title: +Sea on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Sea on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Chennai beach erosion
item.description: Source: TW #Marina beach is one of the most iconic destinations in Chennai and one of the most visited beaches in the world. However the beach as we see today didn’t exist a century ago. This thread explains the formation of #Chennai’s Marina beach This map below shows the approximate original coastline of Chennai during British era. It was much closer to the Kamarajar road. A promenade was developed during the british era and that is when it got the name, “Marina”.
